user.title: Connect to Acuity NVR
user.description: Enter the NVR URL. Recommended: the token-gated Scrypted endpoint, e.g. https://scrypted.example.com/endpoint/@acuity/nvr/public (requires the API Token from the plugin's Network settings). Alternative: the standalone server, e.g. https://192.168.1.10:10444 (turn off certificate verification for its self-signed cert).

data.api_token: API token (from the plugin's Network settings)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the NVR. Check the URL and that the plugin is running.
error.invalid_auth: The NVR rejected the API token. Check the API Token setting in the plugin.
error.invalid_url: Enter a full URL starting with http:// or https://.

init.title: Acuity NVR options
init.description: The sidebar panel embeds the NVR web UI in an iframe; the URL is pre-filled from your connection settings (clear the field to remove the panel). If the URL uses a self-signed certificate, visit it once directly in your browser and accept the warning, or the panel renders blank. Turn off camera or motion entities if a native integration (e.g. Reolink) already provides them — they are removed as devices, and the Media Browser recordings keep working either way.

data.web_ui_url: Web UI URL for the sidebar panel (empty = no panel)
